case_title: THE GODFREY CO., INC. VS WEINFELD DEBBIE

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF OCT-16-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE GODFREY CO., INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEINFELD DEBBIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
